body:
REQUEST_CHANGES
Fix in store.go correctly threads workingDir through detectPrefix and resolves the worktree-cwd contamination. However, the new test does not simulate the bug scenario: it never chdirs into a worktree-shaped path, so it would pass on main too — failing AC #2's 'fails-before-fix, passes-after' requirement. Layer-2 bead and deferral note are acceptable.

APPROVE
This iteration cleanly addresses the prior REQUEST_CHANGES finding: both regression tests now `t.Chdir` into a worktree-shaped non-git temp dir before invoking `NewStore`/`detectPrefix`, so the pre-fix code path (which fell back to `filepath.Base(cwd)`) is actually exercised. Prior iteration's store.go fix and layer-2 design bead remain intact.
